ddls:
CREATE TABLE "recipes" (
  "food_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the recipe */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the recipe belongs to */,
  "dietary_type" TEXT /* Type of dietary classification (e.g., vegan, gluten-free) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description including ingredients and preparation steps */,
  "cooking_time" INTEGER /* Time required to cook the recipe */,
  "serving_size" INTEGER /* Number of servings the recipe yields */,
  "calories" REAL /* Total calories per serving */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the recipe */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the recipe was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the recipe was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the recipe */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("food_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient */,
  "nutritional_value" TEXT /* Nutritional value per standard serving */,
  "dietary_type" TEXT /* Type of dietary classification (e.g., vegan, gluten-free) */,
  "allergen_info" TEXT /* Information about potential allergens */,
  "storage_instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for storing the ingredient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_ingredients" (
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ingredient */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the ingredient required */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the ingredient (e.g., grams, cups) */,
  "optional" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ingredient is optional */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_id", "ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for threaded comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_comments_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("food_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES recipe_comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Value of the rating (e.g., from 1 to 5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("food_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Healthy Food, Snack) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., chef, nutritionist) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with this role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutritional_info" (
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe */,
  "calories" REAL /* Total calories per serving */,
  "protein" REAL /* Total protein per serving */,
  "fat" REAL /* Total fat per serving */,
  "carbohydrates" REAL /* Total carbohydrates per serving */,
  "fiber" REAL /* Total fiber per serving */,
  "sugar" REAL /* Total sugar per serving */,
  "sodium" REAL /* Total sodium per serving */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_versions_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("food_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ingredient_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ingredient */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ingredient_sources_ingredient_id FOREIGN KEY ("ingredient_id") REFERENCES ingredients ("ingredient_id")
)
